summary: Iteration 134: Verified NEW streak freeze feature - Backend APIs (GET/POST streak-freezes) pass all tests. Frontend UI shows Trade Streak Freeze (200 pts) and Habit Streak Freeze (150 pts) cards with quantity selectors, Buy buttons, and 'Not enough points' error handling.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend rewards.py lines 990-1146: Streak freeze endpoints well implemented with proper validation
STREAK_FREEZE_COSTS dict at line 992-995 correctly defines trade=200, habit=150 pts
PurchaseStreakFreezeRequest model validates freeze_type and quantity (1-10 range)
get_streak_freezes returns all expected fields: trade_freezes, habit_freezes, costs, available_points, usage_history
purchase_streak_freeze validates: invalid type (400), quantity out of range (400/422), insufficient points (400)
Frontend MyRewardsPage.jsx StreakFreezeSection component correctly implements UI with data-testid attributes
Frontend api.js lines 159-161: rewardsAPI.getStreakFreezes and purchaseStreakFreeze methods implemented correctly
seed_data_creation: None - used existing user with 50 reward points (insufficient for streak freeze purchase)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 134 tested the NEW streak freeze feature. User has 50 points, trade freeze costs 200 pts, habit freeze costs 150 pts. Both backend APIs (GET /api/rewards/streak-freezes, POST /api/rewards/streak-freezes/purchase) work correctly. Frontend StreakFreezeSection shows cards with Available/Used counts, Cost Each, quantity selector (-/+), Buy button, and 'Not enough points' error message. Previous fixes (habit upload body, dashboard eye toggle, lot_size truncation) still working per regression tests.

features: Red error text showing points available
